plugins.name: config-evolve
plugins.description: Monthly memory-and-apply layer around the built-in /insights command. A bundled hook augments /insights so its fixes are captured into a dated, ranked review doc, diffed against prior months so applied or rejected items never reappear, and extended with the change types /insights skips (permission allowlist entries, saved slash commands, MCP servers, settings tweaks). Applies what you approve with backups. Runs after /insights, on a monthly schedule, or on demand. Complements setup-audit by focusing on what to add

plugins.name: changelog-monitor
plugins.description: Monitor Claude Code changelog for new versions

plugins.name: migrate-ai-config
plugins.description: Interactively migrate Claude Code and/or Codex config between macOS, Windows, and Linux

plugins.name: setup-audit
plugins.description: Audit a Claude Code installation for bloat, conflicts, and duplicate/overlapping skills and plugins

plugins.name: claude-usage
plugins.description: Report Claude Code usage from local transcripts: total active hours, sessions, date range, and per-month / per-project breakdowns

plugins.name: yt-tutorial
plugins.description: Turn a YouTube video into a complete, beginner-friendly, publication-ready tutorial: fetch the transcript, research examples, and rewrite in a conversational explainer voice

plugins.name: transcript-to-notebooklm
plugins.description: Clean .srt/.vtt subtitles or timestamped transcripts into plain .txt, then create a NotebookLM notebook and upload them as sources via the nlm CLI
